title: Annual ROC Filing Service Bangalore | Virtual Auditor
description: Expert ROC annual filing in Bangalore. AOC-4, MGT-7, DIR-3 KYC, annual return compliance. Avoid penalties. Call +91-95139 39333.
bodyText:
Looking for annual ROC filing services in Bangalore? Virtual Auditor handles complete annual compliance under the Companies Act, 2013 — AOC-4 (financial statements), MGT-7/MGT-7A (annual return), DIR-3 KYC, and all event-based filings with the Registrar of Companies, Bangalore.

What is Annual ROC Filing Service Bangalore | Virtual Auditor?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  AOC-4 filing — annual financial statements with Board's Report, Auditor's Report, and Balance Sheet filed with ROC Bangalore within 30 days of AGM. MGT-7/MGT-7A — annual return with complete shareholding pattern, director details, and compliance certification. DIR-3 KYC — annual KYC update for all directors (due every 30 September). ADT-1 — auditor appointment form. Board meeting minutes and AGM minutes preparation. Annual compliance calendar with all ROC due dates and penalty alerts. Identification and filing of any overdue or pending forms from previous years.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for ROC Filing in Bangalore
  Late ROC filing attracts additional fees of Rs 100 per day per form with no upper cap — a single missed AOC-4 filing can cost Rs 36,500+ in penalties per year. Virtual Auditor ensures zero missed deadlines through our proactive compliance tracking system. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS) handles both financial statement preparation and ROC filing under one engagement — no coordination gap between your accountant and company secretary. Our Bangalore office at MG Road provides direct support for ROC Bangalore queries. We also handle compliance catch-up for companies with overdue filings, including condonation of delay applications where applicable.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Compliance health check — review existing filings, identify gaps, and create a remediation plan. Step 2: Financial statement preparation (if needed) and Board's Report drafting. Step 3: Board meeting and AGM facilitation — agenda, minutes, resolutions. Step 4: AOC-4 filing within 30 days of AGM. Step 5: MGT-7/MGT-7A filing within 60 days of AGM. Step 6: DIR-3 KYC filing for all directors. Step 7: Year-round compliance monitoring with advance deadline alerts.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need ROC filing services in Bangalore? Contact Virtual Auditor:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-95139 39333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001
  Fixed annual compliance packages. Zero penalty guarantee.

faqs.q: What is the penalty for late ROC filing in Bangalore?
faqs.a: Late filing attracts additional fees of Rs 100 per day per form with no upper cap. For AOC-4 and MGT-7 combined, the penalty can exceed Rs 73,000 per year. Directors may also face personal liability for non-compliance.

faqs.q: What forms are required for annual ROC compliance?
faqs.a: Mandatory annual forms: AOC-4 (financial statements, due within 30 days of AGM), MGT-7/MGT-7A (annual return, due within 60 days of AGM), and DIR-3 KYC (director KYC, due 30 September annually). Additional event-based forms may apply.

faqs.q: Can you handle overdue ROC filings from previous years?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle compliance catch-up including filing of all overdue AOC-4 and MGT-7 forms, payment of additional fees, and condonation of delay applications with MCA where applicable.
